current_slice: Feature 070 ephemeral staging and E2E architecture v1

feature_findings.finding: Browser journeys could run using service credentials.
feature_findings.resolution: Exact human IdP/BFF and authenticated UI blockers are mandatory; browser_e2e_enabled is false.

feature_findings.finding: Role personas existed without journey coverage.
feature_findings.resolution: Every API-required and browser-required role must have a principal and journey.

feature_findings.finding: Journey status/permission claims could drift from OpenAPI/RBAC.
feature_findings.resolution: Methods, statuses, route permissions and actor allow/deny expectations are checked.

feature_findings.finding: Reset could omit mutable resource classes or safety postconditions.
feature_findings.resolution: Derived mutable-resource coverage, exact ordered steps and exact postconditions are required.

feature_findings.finding: Secrets or production endpoints could enter the plan.
feature_findings.resolution: Secret-pattern scan, safe credential references and loopback/test endpoint allowlist fail closed.

feature_findings.finding: Browser tests could duplicate lower-layer concerns.
feature_findings.resolution: Exact API/browser concern ownership and violations fail closed.

feature_findings.finding: Consumer stubs could be presented as external verification.
feature_findings.resolution: Provider-contract-only status and external-verification overclaim checks.
Validator cache and consolidated negative cases preserve coverage with deterministic resource use.

feature_findings.finding: Architecture could be mistaken for deployed staging.
feature_findings.resolution: Summary flags, docs, eval, release state and limitations explicitly deny execution/deployment.

open_findings.finding: No runner has executed the declared environment lifecycle and twenty API/system journeys.
No approved IdP/BFF/session or authenticated role-aware UI exists.
OS Electoral and Content Agency have not executed consumer suites.
No authorized durable corpus bytes or real ingestion exist.
No production platform, observability, load/HA, recovery, privacy operations, merge or deployment exists.
